The '''''Maelstrom''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] under the command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]].

==History==
Zaarin sent the ''Maelstrom'', along with [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] and [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defenders]] to destroy the lead ship of [[Task Force Whirlwind]], the Immobilizer 418 cruiser [[Whirlwind (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Whirlwind'']]. The attack was thwarted by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] and the ''Maelstrom'' was destroyed. It did stall the task force long enough to prevent the ''Whirlwind'' from playing out the role it had in trapping Zaarin's attack force that were attempting to capture [[Missile Boat]]s. Maarek Stele was sent to prevent the convoy from falling into Zaarin's hands.
